001package net.okocraft.box.api.feature;
002
003import com.github.siroshun09.event4j.handlerlist.Key;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006import java.util.Objects;
007
008/**
009 * An abstract implementation of {@link BoxFeature}.
010 */
011public abstract class AbstractBoxFeature implements BoxFeature {
012
013    private final String name;
014    private final Key listenerKey;
015
016    /**
017     * The constructor of {@link AbstractBoxFeature}.
018     *
019     * @param name the feature name
020     */
021    protected AbstractBoxFeature(@NotNull String name) {
022        this.name = Objects.requireNonNull(name);
023        this.listenerKey = Key.of(name);
024    }
025
026    @Override
027    public @NotNull String getName() {
028        return name;
029    }
030
031    @Override
032    public @NotNull Key getListenerKey() {
033        return listenerKey;
034    }
035}
